rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is a normative test of privacy valuation intransitivity across money vs. goods exchanges (11+2 experiments on WTA/procedure invariance), while the cited paper is about when dynamic retargeting ads outperform generic ads in online travel advertising. This is a strong construct/method mismatch with no indication in the provided notes that the retargeting study is a direct theory, method, or benchmark source for the intransitivity tests. With only a bare DOI match and no contextual citation text, this looks most likely like incidental background on digital advertising/data use.
